2242000.name: Bat N' Ball
2242000.description: Bat N' Ball VR puts you right in the middle of the action! Test your skills as a virtual batter and take on auto throwed balls in this fast-paced, realistic virtual reality game. Challenge yourself to beat your own personal high score. See how long you can keep your batting streak going, as you try to outlast the robotic pitcher in this intense VR baseball game. With stunning visuals and a realistic virtual environment, Bat N' Ball VR is sure to bring the excitement of the baseball diamond to your living room.
2242000.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
